hero.label: Trusted Since 1909
hero.title: Giving Textile Waste a
hero.description: For over a century, Fiber Conversion Inc. has transformed textile byproducts into valuable industrial fibers. We help manufacturers reduce waste, lower costs, and build a more sustainable supply chain.

servicesSection.label: What We Do
servicesSection.title: Comprehensive Textile Recycling Solutions
servicesSection.description: From collection to processing, we provide end-to-end fiber recycling services that keep textile waste out of landfills and back in the supply chain.

cards.title: Fiber Processing
cards.description: We process raw textile waste into clean, graded fibers ready for reuse in manufacturing applications across multiple industries.

cards.title: Waste Collection
cards.description: Reliable pickup and collection services for textile manufacturers. We handle your waste streams so you can focus on production.

cards.title: Custom Fiber Solutions
cards.description: Need a specific fiber blend or grade? We work directly with you to develop custom recycled fiber products tailored to your specifications.

aboutPreview.label: Our Story
aboutPreview.title: A Legacy of Sustainable Innovation
aboutPreview.paragraph1: Since 1909, Fiber Conversion Inc. has been a cornerstone of the New York textile recycling industry. What started as a small fiber reclamation operation has grown into a full-service recycling and processing facility trusted by manufacturers across the Northeast.
aboutPreview.paragraph2: Every bale of fiber we process represents waste diverted from landfills and raw materials preserved for future generations. Our commitment to the circular economy isn't a trend — it's been our mission for over a century.
aboutPreview.visualDescription: Proudly serving the New York community for over a century

whyChooseUs.label: Why Fiber Conversion
whyChooseUs.title: Built on Experience. Driven by Sustainability.
whyChooseUs.description: We combine over a century of expertise with modern processing technology to deliver reliable, high-quality recycled fibers.

values.title: Trusted Heritage
values.description: Over 115 years of continuous operation, building relationships and delivering consistent quality to our partners.

values.title: Zero-Waste Goal
values.description: We are committed to diverting textile waste from landfills and maximizing the value of every fiber we process.

values.title: Custom Solutions
values.description: Every customer is unique. We tailor our fiber processing to match your exact specifications and delivery schedules.

values.title: Customer First
values.description: At Fiber Conversion, the customer always comes first. We build long-term partnerships rooted in reliability and trust.

industriesSection.label: Industries Served
industriesSection.title: Recycled Fibers for Every Application
industriesSection.description: Our processed fibers serve a wide range of industries, providing cost-effective and sustainable alternatives to virgin materials.

items.title: Paper & Pulp
items.description: Fiber feedstock for specialty paper products

dualCta.label: Work With Us
dualCta.title: Whether You're Buying or Selling
dualCta.description: We work with both textile waste generators and manufacturers who need quality recycled fibers.

sellCard.title: Have Textile Waste?
sellCard.description: We'll collect and process your textile byproducts, helping you reduce disposal costs and meet your sustainability targets.

buyCard.title: Need Recycled Fibers?
buyCard.description: Browse our selection of high-quality processed fibers, available in custom blends and grades to meet your production needs.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to Make the Sustainable Choice?
ctaBanner.description: Join the growing number of manufacturers who trust Fiber Conversion for reliable, eco-friendly fiber solutions.
